query:
SELECT 
  p.id, 
  p.quotationNumber, 
  fi.totalAmount,
  fi.totalCost,
  ((fi.totalAmount - fi.totalCost) / fi.totalAmount * 100) as rentabilidad,
  fi.remainingAmount,
  p.estimatedInstallDate
FROM projects p
JOIN financialInfo fi ON p.id = fi.projectId
WHERE fi.totalAmount > 0
ORDER BY rentabilidad ASC
LIMIT 10;
